title_zh: 大语言模型主动推理强化学习中的信息自锁现象
title_en: On Information Self-Locking in Reinforcement Learning for Active Reasoning of LLM agents
title_full_en: On Information Self-Locking in Reinforcement Learning for Active Reasoning of LLM agents

authors_with_affil_en.name: Deyu Zou
affil: The Chinese University of Hong Kong

authors_with_affil_en.name: Yongqiang Chen
affil: The Chinese University of Hong Kong

authors_with_affil_en.name: James Cheng
affil: The Chinese University of Hong Kong

affiliations_en: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
abstract_zh: 基于结果奖励的强化学习 (RL) 在训练大语言模型 (LLM) agent 完成复杂推理任务方面已取得显著成功。然而, 在主动推理场景中, agent 需要策略性地提出问题以获取任务相关信息, 我们发现使用 RL 训练的 LLM agent 常常遭遇「信息自锁」现象: agent 不再提出高信息量的问题, 也难以内化已获取的信息。为理解这一现象, 我们将主动推理分解为两个核心能力: 行动选择 (AS, 通过查询决定观察流) 与信念追踪 (BT, 根据收集到的证据更新 agent 的信念)。我们证明, AS 与 BT 能力的不足将限制 RL 训练期间的信息探索; 反之, 信息探索不足又会阻碍 AS 与 BT 能力的提升, 形成正反馈循环, 将 agent 锁定在低信息区域。为解决此问题, 我们提出一种简洁有效的方法, 通过注入易获得的方向性判据 (directional critiques) 来重新分配学习信号, 帮助 agent 摆脱自锁。在 7 个数据集上的广泛实验表明, 我们的方法显著缓解了信息自锁现象, 带来最多 60% 的性能提升。
abstract_en: Reinforcement learning (RL) with outcome-based rewards has achieved significant success in training large language model (LLM) agents for complex reasoning tasks. However, in active reasoning where agents need to strategically ask questions to acquire task-relevant information, we find that LLM agents trained with RL often suffer from information self-locking: the agent ceases to ask informative questions and struggles to internalize already-obtained information. To understand the phenomenon, we decompose active reasoning into two core capabilities: Action Selection (AS), which determines the observation stream through queries, and Belief Tracking (BT), which updates the agent's belief based on collected evidence. We show that deficient AS and BT capabilities will limit the information exploration during RL training. Furthermore, insufficient exploration in turn hinders the improvement of AS and BT, creating a feedback loop that locks the agent in a low-information regime. To resolve the issue, we propose a simple yet effective approach that reallocates the learning signal by injecting easy-to-obtain directional critiques to help the agent escape self-locking. Extensive experiments with 7 datasets show that our approach significantly mitigates the information self-locking, bringing up to 60% improvements.

sections_zh.heading: Q1. 这篇论文试图解决什么问题？
sections_zh.body:
这篇论文旨在解决基于结果奖励的强化学习（RL）在训练大语言模型（LLM）智能体进行主动推理（active reasoning）时出现的「信息自锁定」（Information Self-Locking, SeL）问题。具体而言，该问题表现为以下三个层面：

1. 核心现象：信息自锁定（SeL）
在需要智能体通过多轮交互主动提问以获取缺失信息的任务中（如医疗诊断、偏好估计、故障排查等），标准RL训练导致智能体陷入低信息交互模式：
- 动作选择（AS）失效：智能体停止提出信息性问题，转向保守、重复的查询策略
- 信念跟踪（BT）失效：智能体难以有效内化已获取的信息，无法基于新证据更新内部信念

2. 结构性根源：双向耦合的负反馈循环
论文将主动推理分解为两个核心能力：
- 动作选择（AS）：决定查询什么信息以获取观察
- 信念跟踪（BT）：基于收集的证据更新信念状态

SeL源于这两个能力之间的恶性耦合：
- BT缺陷 masking AS信号：当信念跟踪能力薄弱时，即使提出信息性问题，也无法转化为最终奖励优势，导致RL无法为AS提供有效的学习信号
- AS缺陷限制BT改进：当动作选择过于保守、获取的信息量不足时，BT缺乏足够的证据信号来进行自我改进

这形成一个负反馈循环：I_th（理论AS信息性）和 C_BT（BT能力指数）相互制约，使智能体被锁定在低信息状态（R_{δ,ε} 区域），难以通过标准策略梯度逃离。

3. 训练动态后果
奖励与能力解耦：即使最终任务奖励有所提升，AS和BT能力指标并未改善。交互利用不足：智能体逐渐依赖早期上下文而非交互获取的信息，表现为对反馈的敏感性下降和「信念一致性」异常升高。

解决方案概述：为此，论文提出AREW（Advantage Reweighing with directional critiques）框架，通过注入易于获取的方向性批评（如查询是否获得新信息、信念更新是否正确）来重新分配策略梯度中的优势权重，打破AS与BT之间的负反馈循环，恢复有效的信息探索与利用。实验表明，该方法在7个数据集上显著缓解SeL，最高带来60%的性能提升。

sections_zh.heading: Q2. 有哪些相关研究？
sections_zh.body:
该论文的相关研究主要涵盖以下四个方向：

1. 主动推理与多轮交互（Active Reasoning & Multi-turn Interaction）
- Proactive CoT (Deng et al., 2023)：通过提示工程让LLM识别歧义并生成澄清问题。
- UoT (Hu et al., 2024)：量化每个问题在减少不确定性方面的贡献。
- 多轮评估基准：MT-Eval (Kwan et al., 2024)、MathChat (Liang et al., 2024) 以及专门针对多轮交互中LLM失效模式的研究。
- 多轮谜题推理：Badola et al. (2025) 提出Multi-turn Puzzles评估LLM的交互推理能力，是本文PE-G数据集的原始来源。

2. 基于强化学习的LLM推理训练（RL for LLM Reasoning）
- PPO/GRPO算法：Schulman et al. (2017) 的PPO，以及Shao et al. (2024) 提出的GRPO（Group Relative Policy Optimization），后者被DeepSeek-R1 (Guo et al., 2025) 等模型广泛采用。
- RL增强LLM综述：Wang et al. (2024) 和 Srivastava & Aggarwal (2025) 系统综述了RL在LLM推理中的应用。
- Agentic RL综述：Plaat et al. (2025) 和 Zhang et al. (2025a) 综述了面向LLM智能体的RL方法。

3. 信用分配与中间奖励设计（Credit Assignment & Intermediate Rewards）
这是与本文理论贡献最相关的领域。
- 基于规则的奖励塑造：StepTool (Yu et al., 2024)、StepCoder (Dou et al., 2024) 和 RLVMR (Zhang et al., 2025b) 利用编译器反馈或验证器信号设计中间奖励。
- 基于信念/不确定性的奖励：CURIO (Wan et al., 2025) 构建势函数基于理想信念状态分配中间奖励；Sotopia-RL (Yu et al., 2025) 利用专有LLM进行奖励标注。
- 解耦搜索与回答：Wang et al. (2025b) 发现 outcome-only 训练会导致搜索智能体的系统性缺陷，与本文观察到的SeL现象一致。
- 进度归因：SPA-RL (Wang et al., 2025a) 训练奖励模型并施加求和约束，将最终奖励分解为逐步进度。

4. 信念更新与交互诊断（Belief Tracking & Interactive Diagnosis）
- 医疗诊断：MediQ (Li et al., 2024) 是本文使用的医学问答基准。
- 故障排查：FloDial (Raghu et al., 2021; Hu et al., 2024) 是本文使用的多轮故障诊断对话数据集。
- 主动学习式查询：Zhou et al. (2025) 研究LLM在信息不完整时提出正确问题的能力。

与上述工作相比，本文的独特贡献在于：
- 识别新现象：首次系统性地识别并理论化了「信息自锁定」（SeL）这一结构性失效模式。
- 轻量级干预：不同于需要训练额外奖励模型（如SPA-RL）或枚举潜在状态（如CURIO）的方法，本文提出的AREW仅利用易于获取的二元方向性批评，通过优势重加权注入RL信号，实现最小侵入式修改。

sections_zh.heading: Q3. 论文如何解决这个问题？
sections_zh.body:
论文提出 AREW（Advantage Reweighing with directional critiques） 框架，通过注入易于获取的方向性批评来重新分配学习信号，从而打破动作选择（AS）与信念跟踪（BT）之间的负反馈循环。具体解决方案包含以下三个核心层面：

1. 构建步骤级方向性批评
基于主动推理中交互轮次的可诊断性，为AS和BT通道分别定义二元批评信号：

AS通道批评（查询信息性）
对于第 t 轮的查询动作，定义批评信号 z_t^Q ∈ {−1, 0, +1}：
- +1：查询从环境/用户处获取了信息性反馈（如揭示了新证据）
- −1：查询为非信息性（如重复提问或得到「未知」回复）
- 0：弃权（abstention）
在PE-G任务中，通过检查查询的属性子空间是否产生非支配性项目对来判断；在MediQ中，通过反馈是否包含新的临床事实来判定。

BT通道批评（信念更新有效性）
通过追踪任务相关置信度的标量读出 Ψ_t ∈ [0, 1]（如通过提示获取候选假设的置信度），定义：
- z_t^U := Sign(Ψ_{t+1} − Ψ_t) ∈ {−1, 0, +1}
- +1：智能体成功基于新观察提升了对真实状态的置信度
- −1：信念更新方向错误或未有效吸收信息

2. 边际感知辅助目标
为将批评信号注入策略梯度，设计轨迹内似然边际目标（intra-trajectory likelihood-margin objective）。对于轨迹 τ 及其批评标签 {z_t}_{t=0}^{H−1}，定义正/负批评索引集 P_τ := {t : z_t = +1}, N_τ := {t : z_t = −1}。当 |P_τ| > 0 且 |N_τ| > 0 时，辅助目标为：L̃(ω; τ) := (1/|P_τ|) Σ_{t∈P_τ} log π_{ω,t} − (1/|N_τ|) Σ_{t∈N_τ} log π_{ω,t}。该目标直接鼓励智能体提升被正批评步骤的决策对数概率，相对降低被负批评步骤的概率，且满足中心化性质。

3. 最小侵入式优势重加权
将辅助目标与标准策略梯度（如PPO、GRPO）结合，导出优势重加权机制。增广后的梯度更新为：∇_ω L̃_aug(ω) ∝ E_τ [Σ_{t=0}^{H−1} (A_t + λ u_t) ∇_ω log π_{ω,t}]，其中 A_t 为标准优势估计（来自 outcome reward），λ > 0 为注射强度系数，u_t 为步骤级系数：u_t = 1/|P_τ| if z_t = +1, -1/|N_τ| if z_t = −1, 0 otherwise。关键实现：只需对每步优势进行加性调整 Ã_t ← A_t + λ u_t，无需修改底层奖励函数或RL优化机制。

4. 理论保证与鲁棒性
Proposition 4.1 表明，AREW的有效性由批评的加权准确率（weighted accuracy）决定：只要 Acc_Q(ω) > 1/2（即批评准确率超过随机猜测），AREW即可产生正向的AS信息性改进。意味着AREW不依赖完美准确的批评，对噪声具有鲁棒性（实验验证即使50%噪声下仍有效）。

sections_zh.heading: Q4. 论文做了哪些实验？（1/2）
sections_zh.body:
论文在三个交互式推理领域、七个任务上进行了系统评估，涵盖性能对比、训练动态分析、算法泛化性测试及鲁棒性验证。

1. 实验设置
数据集：
- 偏好估计（Preference Estimation）：PE-G(S=2/S=3)：受限属性子空间的偏好推断任务；PE-F(D=8/D=6)：全属性偏好估计，使用连续奖励（归一化相似度提升）
- 医疗诊断（Medical Diagnosis）：MediQ：基于临床情景的假设推断，智能体需通过提问识别正确诊断
- 故障排查（Troubleshooting）：FloDial-Easy / FloDial-Hard：多轮技术故障诊断对话，难度分简单/困难两档

所有数据集均采用仅结果监督（outcome-only supervision）：仅在交互结束时提供二元或连续奖励。

基线与对比方法：
- 直接推理（Direct Inference）：未经RL训练的模型，包括o4-mini、Qwen-2.5-7B-Instruct、LLaMA-3.1-8B-Instruct
- 标准RL基线：PPO、GRPO、GSPO（Group Sequence Policy Optimization）
- AREW变体：AREW–AS ONLY（仅注入AS通道批评）、AREW–AS + BT（同时注入AS和BT通道批评）

评估指标：
- 最终任务奖励（Final Reward）
- AS能力代理（AS Proxy）：衡量查询信息性
- BT能力代理（BT Proxy）：衡量信念更新有效性

2. 主要实验结果（Table 1）
在28个评估设置中的27个中，AREW显著优于vanilla PPO基线：
- PE-G(S=3)：vanilla PPO为18.3，AREW–AS + BT达到80.3（提升62.0）
- FloDial-Hard：vanilla PPO为21.3，AREW–AS ONLY提升至36.0，AREW–AS + BT进一步提升至42.3（提升21.0）
- 跨模型一致性：在Qwen-2.5-7B和LLaMA-3.1-8B上均观察到类似提升模式
- AS+BT变体在14个案例中的11个中优于AS-ONLY，表明双通道批评的协同效应

sections_zh.heading: Q4. 论文做了哪些实验？（2/2）
sections_zh.body:
3. 训练动态分析（Figure 3 & 4）
- 奖励优化轨迹：vanilla PPO在部分任务中完全停滞（SeL陷阱），而AREW实现持续单调提升
- AS与BT能力演化：AS-ONLY变体提升了AS代理指标，AS+BT变体在BT代理指标上有额外增益
- 即使仅改进AS，也能间接提升BT（信息获取与信念更新的内在耦合）

跨RL算法泛化性（Figure 5b & 5c）：在GRPO和GSPO算法上验证AREW。PE-F(D=8)（GRPO）：vanilla GRPO的AS代理为0.114，AREW提升至0.344；BT代理从-0.001提升至0.015。FloDial-Easy（GSPO）：最终性能从35.00（vanilla）提升至47.33（AREW–AS + BT），AS代理从0.09提升至0.41，BT代理从0.13提升至0.31。结果表明AREW的优势重加权机制与不同RL算法兼容。

4. 诊断与鲁棒性实验
鲁棒性分析：噪声批评（Table 2）测试AREW对批评标签噪声的容忍度：即使50%的批评被随机翻转（α=0.5），AREW仍优于或与vanilla PPO相当（PE-G(S=3) 中30.3 vs 18.3；FloDial-Hard中23.3 vs 21.3），验证了理论命题4.1。

重加权强度λ的影响（Figure 5d）：
- λ 过小（0.05）：信号不足，难以逃离SeL
- λ 适中（0.20）：平衡探索与稳定，实现持续性能提升
- λ 过大（5.0）：训练不稳定和最终性能崩溃

交互敏感性干预实验（Figure 5a）：在MediQ中将所有患者反馈替换为「Unknown」，证实SeL导致的交互利用不足。

5. 关键结论：实验验证了SeL的普遍性（PPO/GRPO/GSPO中均观察到）、AREW的有效性（轻量级批评注入恢复信息寻求行为）、理论-实验一致性。

sections_zh.heading: Q5. 有什么可以进一步探索的点？
sections_zh.body:
基于论文的实验观察与理论分析，以下方向值得进一步探索（精选 4 个核心方向）：

1. 自适应重加权机制设计
当前AREW使用固定的重加权强度 λ，实验表明过大或过小都有问题。可探索方向：
- 基于训练动态的自适应 λ 调整
- 结构感知的步骤级加权：当前 u_t 仅依赖批评符号，可结合步骤置信度或信息增益幅度进行细粒度加权
- 引入课程学习机制，逐步降低对批评信号的依赖

2. 自动化与可学习的批评构建
当前批评信号（z_t^Q, z_t^U）依赖任务特定的启发式规则。局限性：复杂领域中信息性判断可能非平凡，人工设计可能引入系统性偏差。可探索方向：
- 元学习自动发现最优批评信号
- 利用辅助判别器学习预测步骤级贡献
- 噪声鲁棒性优化

3. 复杂信念表示与SeL
当前理论假设标量势函数衡量信念质量。扩展方向：
- 结构化信念空间：连续分布、图结构或层次化表示时，SeL的表现形式
- 近似贝叶斯更新：在神经网络参数化信念中BT能力的量化与优化
- 不确定性量化：结合认知与偶然不确定性指导探索

4. 多智能体与协作场景中的SeL
当前研究聚焦于单智能体-环境交互：
- 多智能体协作：共享部分观察时AS与BT的耦合可能引入社会困境
- 对抗性环境：对手可能策略性提供误导信息

sections_zh.heading: Q6. 总结一下论文的主要内容
sections_zh.body:
这篇论文系统研究了基于结果奖励的强化学习（RL）在训练LLM智能体进行主动推理时的结构性失效问题，提出了「信息自锁定」（Information Self-Locking, SeL）现象，并设计了相应的解决方案。

1. 核心问题：信息自锁定（SeL）
在主动推理任务中，标准RL训练导致智能体陷入SeL状态：动作选择（AS）失效，信念跟踪（BT）失效。SeL源于AS与BT之间的双向负反馈循环：
- 弱BT掩盖AS的学习信号
- 弱AS限制BT改进

理论证明，当智能体初始化在低AS/低BT区域时，策略梯度更新满足 (Δ+_Q I_th(ω) Δ+_U C_BT(ω)) ⪯ η(0 βI αβC)(I_th(ω) C_BT(ω)) + o(η)，表明两者相互制约，难以通过标准RL逃离。

2. 解决方案：AREW框架
提出Advantage Reweighing with directional critiques (AREW)，通过注入步骤级方向性批评打破SeL：
- 批评信号构建：AS批评 z_t^Q ∈ {−1, 0, +1} 标记查询是否获取信息性反馈；BT批评 z_t^U ∈ {−1, 0, +1} 标记信念更新是否有效
- 优势重加权机制：通过边际感知辅助目标，将批评转化为优势调整：Ã_t ← A_t + λ u_t
- 理论保证：只要加权准确率 Acc_Q(ω) > 1/2，即可产生正向改进

3. 实验验证
在7个任务和3种RL算法（PPO、GRPO、GSPO）上验证：
- 性能提升：AREW在27/28个设置中优于vanilla RL，最高提升达60%
- 能力恢复：AS+BT变体同时提升信息获取量与信念更新质量
- 训练动态：AREW打破奖励与能力的解耦
- 鲁棒性验证：噪声容忍（50%翻转仍有效）、算法泛化、干预分析

4. 贡献与意义
- 现象识别：首次系统揭示并理论化RL训练中的SeL现象
- 理论框架：建立AS-BT耦合的动力学模型
- 轻量级方案：AREW无需修改奖励函数或训练额外模型
- 实用指导：为设计可靠的交互式LLM智能体提供了具体路径

sections_zh.heading: Q7. 想要进一步了解论文
sections_zh.body:
如需深入理解本论文，建议按以下顺序扩展阅读：

1. 论文原文与附录
完整方法、理论证明（Proposition 4.1）与实验细节见 arXiv:2603.12109 原文（https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.12109）。附录中包含 7 个数据集的完整配置、超参数表与消融实验。

2. 关键参考文献
- PPO: Schulman et al. (2017) — 策略梯度基础
- GRPO: Shao et al. (2024) — DeepSeek-R1 训练方法
- MediQ: Li et al. (2024) — 医疗诊断基准
- FloDial: Raghu et al. (2021) — 多轮故障排查数据集

3. 实验可复现性
论文未明确公布训练代码与 checkpoint 链接；若需复现实验，建议关注作者团队（CUHK + UCSD + Georgia Tech + ByteDance）后续开源。

sections_en.heading: Q1. What problem does this paper try to solve?
sections_en.body:
This paper addresses the Information Self-Locking (SeL) problem that emerges when training LLM agents with outcome-based reinforcement learning for active reasoning tasks (medical diagnosis, preference estimation, troubleshooting). The issue manifests at three levels:

1. Core phenomenon: SeL
In tasks requiring multi-turn interaction to acquire missing information, standard RL training causes agents to fall into a low-information interaction mode:
- Action Selection (AS) fails: agents stop asking informative questions, shift to conservative repetitive queries
- Belief Tracking (BT) fails: agents cannot effectively internalize obtained information

2. Structural root cause: bidirectional coupling feedback loop
- BT deficiency masks AS signal: when belief tracking is weak, informative queries cannot translate into reward advantages
- AS deficiency limits BT improvement: conservative action selection deprives BT of training signals

This forms a negative feedback loop where I_th (AS informativeness) and C_BT (BT capability) constrain each other, locking agents in the low-information R_{δ,ε} region.

3. Training dynamics consequences
Reward and capability decouple: even when task reward improves, AS/BT capability metrics don't. Interaction under-utilization: agents increasingly rely on early context rather than interaction-gained information.

Solution overview: The paper proposes AREW (Advantage Reweighing with directional critiques), injecting easy-to-obtain directional critiques (whether queries obtain new information, whether belief updates are correct) to reallocate policy gradient advantage weights, breaking the AS-BT feedback loop.

sections_en.heading: Q2. What related work exists?
sections_en.body:
The paper's related work spans four directions:

1. Active Reasoning & Multi-turn Interaction
- Proactive CoT (Deng et al., 2023): prompt engineering to identify ambiguity and generate clarification questions
- UoT (Hu et al., 2024): quantifying each question's contribution to uncertainty reduction
- Multi-turn evaluation benchmarks: MT-Eval (Kwan et al., 2024), MathChat (Liang et al., 2024)
- Multi-turn puzzle reasoning: Badola et al. (2025) Multi-turn Puzzles (source of PE-G)

2. RL for LLM Reasoning
- PPO/GRPO algorithms (Schulman 2017, Shao 2024) — GRPO adopted by DeepSeek-R1 (Guo 2025)
- RL-enhanced LLM surveys: Wang 2024, Srivastava & Aggarwal 2025
- Agentic RL surveys: Plaat 2025, Zhang 2025a

3. Credit Assignment & Intermediate Rewards (most relevant to theoretical contribution)
- Rule-based reward shaping: StepTool (Yu 2024), StepCoder (Dou 2024), RLVMR (Zhang 2025b)
- Belief/uncertainty-based rewards: CURIO (Wan 2025) potential function, Sotopia-RL (Yu 2025)
- Decoupling search and answer: Wang 2025b (also finds outcome-only defects)
- Progress attribution: SPA-RL (Wang 2025a) reward decomposition

4. Belief Tracking & Interactive Diagnosis
- Medical diagnosis: MediQ (Li 2024)
- Troubleshooting: FloDial (Raghu 2021, Hu 2024)
- Active learning queries: Zhou 2025

Unique contribution: first to systematically identify and theorize SeL as a structural failure mode with bidirectional AS-BT coupling; AREW is lightweight compared to methods that train reward models (SPA-RL) or enumerate latent states (CURIO).

sections_en.heading: Q3. How does the paper solve it?
sections_en.body:
The paper proposes AREW (Advantage Reweighing with directional critiques), injecting easy-to-obtain directional critiques to reallocate learning signals, breaking the AS-BT negative feedback loop. The solution has three core components:

1. Constructing step-level directional critiques
For AS and BT channels, define binary critique signals based on the diagnosability of interaction turns:

AS channel critique (query informativeness): z_t^Q ∈ {−1, 0, +1}
- +1: query elicits informative feedback from environment/user (reveals new evidence)
- −1: non-informative query (repetition or 'Unknown' response)
- 0: abstention
In PE-G: check if query's attribute subspace produces non-dominated item pairs; in MediQ: check if feedback contains new clinical facts.

BT channel critique (belief update effectiveness):
- Track task-relevant confidence scalar readout Ψ_t ∈ [0, 1]
- z_t^U := Sign(Ψ_{t+1} − Ψ_t) ∈ {−1, 0, +1}
- +1: agent successfully improved confidence in true state based on new observation
- −1: belief update direction wrong or ineffective

2. Margin-aware auxiliary objective
Design intra-trajectory likelihood-margin objective to inject critiques into policy gradient. For trajectory τ with critique labels {z_t}, define P_τ := {t : z_t = +1}, N_τ := {t : z_t = −1}. When |P_τ| > 0 and |N_τ| > 0: L̃(ω; τ) := (1/|P_τ|) Σ_{t∈P_τ} log π_{ω,t} − (1/|N_τ|) Σ_{t∈N_τ} log π_{ω,t}. This directly encourages higher log-probability for positively critiqued steps and lower for negatively critiqued steps, while satisfying the centralization property.

3. Minimum-invasive advantage reweighting
Combine auxiliary objective with standard policy gradient (PPO/GRPO): augmented gradient is ∇_ω L̃_aug(ω) ∝ E_τ [Σ_{t=0}^{H−1} (A_t + λ u_t) ∇_ω log π_{ω,t}]. Only requires additive adjustment Ã_t ← A_t + λ u_t to per-step advantage — no modification of underlying reward function or RL optimization.

4. Theoretical guarantees & robustness
Proposition 4.1: AREW effectiveness determined by critique weighted accuracy Acc_Q(ω) > 1/2 — AREW works with noisy critiques (experimentally validated even at 50% noise).

sections_en.heading: Q4. What experiments were run? (1/2)
sections_en.body:
The paper conducts systematic evaluation across three interactive reasoning domains and seven tasks, covering performance comparison, training dynamics analysis, algorithm generalizability tests, and robustness verification.

1. Experimental setup
Datasets:
- Preference Estimation: PE-G(S=2/S=3) constrained attribute subspace; PE-F(D=8/D=6) full-attribute with continuous reward
- Medical Diagnosis: MediQ clinical scenario hypothesis inference
- Troubleshooting: FloDial-Easy / FloDial-Hard multi-turn technical diagnosis

All datasets use outcome-only supervision: binary or continuous reward only at end of interaction.

Baselines & comparison methods:
- Direct Inference (no RL training): o4-mini, Qwen-2.5-7B-Instruct, LLaMA-3.1-8B-Instruct
- Standard RL baselines: PPO (Schulman 2017), GRPO (Shao 2024), GSPO (Zheng 2025)
- AREW variants: AREW–AS ONLY (only AS channel critique), AREW–AS + BT (both channels)

Evaluation metrics:
- Final task reward
- AS capability proxy (query informativeness)
- BT capability proxy (belief update effectiveness)

2. Main experimental results (Table 1)
In 27/28 evaluation settings, AREW significantly outperforms vanilla PPO:
- PE-G(S=3): vanilla PPO 18.3, AREW–AS+BT 80.3 (+62.0)
- FloDial-Hard: vanilla PPO 21.3, AREW–AS ONLY 36.0, AREW–AS+BT 42.3 (+21.0)
- Cross-model consistency: similar gains on Qwen-2.5-7B and LLaMA-3.1-8B
- AS+BT variant outperforms AS-ONLY in 11/14 cases, showing dual-channel critique synergy

sections_en.heading: Q4. What experiments were run? (2/2)
sections_en.body:
3. Training dynamics analysis (Figure 3 & 4)
- Reward optimization trajectories: vanilla PPO completely stalls in some tasks (SeL trap), while AREW achieves continuous monotonic improvement
- AS and BT capability evolution: AS-ONLY variant improves AS proxy; AS+BT variant gains additional BT proxy improvement
- Even improving only AS indirectly improves BT (intrinsic coupling of information acquisition and belief update)

Cross-RL-algorithm generalizability (Figure 5b & 5c):
- GRPO on PE-F(D=8): AS proxy 0.114 (vanilla) → 0.344 (AREW); BT proxy -0.001 → 0.015
- GSPO on FloDial-Easy: final perf 35.00 (vanilla) → 47.33 (AREW–AS+BT); AS proxy 0.09 → 0.41; BT proxy 0.13 → 0.31
- AREW's advantage reweighting mechanism is compatible with different RL algorithms, not limited to specific policy gradient implementations

4. Diagnosis & robustness experiments
Robustness: noisy critiques (Table 2) test tolerance to critique label noise. Even with 50% random critique flipping (α=0.5), AREW still outperforms or matches vanilla PPO (PE-G(S=3): 30.3 vs 18.3; FloDial-Hard: 23.3 vs 21.3), validating Proposition 4.1.

Reweighting strength λ effect (Figure 5d):
- λ too small (0.05): insufficient signal, hard to escape SeL
- λ moderate (0.20): balanced exploration & stability, sustained improvement
- λ too large (5.0): unstable training, final performance collapse

Interaction sensitivity intervention (Figure 5a): In MediQ, replace all patient feedback with 'Unknown' to test interaction dependency. Confirms SeL causes interaction under-utilization.

5. Key conclusions: experiments validate SeL's prevalence (across PPO/GRPO/GSPO), AREW's effectiveness (lightweight critique injection restores information-seeking behavior), theory-experiment consistency.

sections_en.heading: Q5. What are future research directions?
sections_en.body:
Based on experimental observations and theoretical analysis, the following directions merit further exploration (4 selected directions):

1. Adaptive reweighting mechanism design
Current AREW uses fixed reweighting strength λ, but experiments show too small or too large both have problems. Explore:
- Training-dynamics-based adaptive λ adjustment (e.g., based on AS/BT capability change rate)
- Structure-aware step-level weighting: current u_t only depends on critique sign; can combine step confidence or information gain magnitude for fine-grained weighting
- Curriculum learning mechanism to gradually reduce critique signal dependence

2. Automated and learnable critique construction
Current critique signals (z_t^Q, z_t^U) rely on task-specific heuristic rules. Limitations: in complex domains, informativeness judgment may be non-trivial; manually designed critiques may introduce systematic bias. Explore:
- Meta-learning to automatically discover optimal critique signals
- Auxiliary discriminator to learn predicting step-level contribution
- Noise robustness optimization for extreme noise environments

3. Complex belief representation and SeL
Current theory assumes scalar potential function for belief quality. Extension directions:
- Structured belief spaces: continuous distributions, graph structures, hierarchical representations
- Approximate Bayesian updates: quantification and optimization of BT capability in neural-network-parameterized beliefs
- Uncertainty quantification: combine epistemic and aleatoric uncertainty to guide exploration

4. SeL in multi-agent and collaborative scenarios
- Multi-agent collaboration: AS-BT coupling may introduce social dilemmas
- Adversarial environments: opponents may strategically provide misleading information

sections_en.heading: Q6. Summary of the paper
sections_en.body:
This paper systematically studies the structural failure of outcome-reward RL when training LLM agents for active reasoning, proposes the Information Self-Locking (SeL) phenomenon, and designs the corresponding solution.

1. Core problem: SeL
In active reasoning tasks (medical diagnosis, preference estimation, troubleshooting), standard RL training causes agents to fall into SeL: AS fails, BT fails. SeL arises from the bidirectional negative feedback loop between AS and BT:
- Weak BT masks AS learning signal
- Weak AS limits BT improvement

Theoretically, when an agent is initialized in the low-AS/low-BT region, policy gradient updates satisfy (Δ+_Q I_th(ω) Δ+_U C_BT(ω)) ⪯ η(0 βI αβC)(I_th(ω) C_BT(ω)) + o(η), showing the two constrain each other and cannot escape via standard RL.

2. Solution: AREW framework
Propose Advantage Reweighing with directional critiques (AREW), injecting step-level directional critiques to break SeL:
- Critique signal construction: AS critique z_t^Q ∈ {−1, 0, +1} marks whether query elicits informative feedback; BT critique z_t^U ∈ {−1, 0, +1} marks whether belief update is effective
- Advantage reweighting mechanism: via margin-aware auxiliary objective, convert critique to advantage adjustment: Ã_t ← A_t + λ u_t
- Theoretical guarantee: as long as weighted accuracy Acc_Q(ω) > 1/2, produces positive improvement

3. Experimental validation
Across 7 tasks and 3 RL algorithms (PPO/GRPO/GSPO):
- Performance: AREW outperforms vanilla RL in 27/28 settings, up to 60% improvement
- Capability recovery: AS+BT variant improves both information acquisition and belief update quality
- Training dynamics: AREW breaks reward-capability decoupling
- Robustness: noise tolerance (effective at 50% flip), algorithm generalization, intervention analysis

4. Contributions & significance
- Phenomenon identification: first to systematically reveal and theorize SeL
- Theoretical framework: AS-BT coupling dynamics model
- Lightweight solution: AREW without reward function modification or additional model training
- Practical guidance: concrete path to designing reliable interactive LLM agents

sections_en.heading: Q7. To learn more about the paper
sections_en.body:
For deeper understanding, we recommend the following reading order:

1. Original paper & appendix
Full method, theoretical proof (Proposition 4.1), and experimental details are in arXiv:2603.12109 (https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.12109). The appendix contains complete configurations for all 7 datasets, hyperparameter tables, and ablation studies.

2. Key references
- PPO: Schulman et al. (2017) — policy gradient foundation
- GRPO: Shao et al. (2024) — DeepSeek-R1 training method
- MediQ: Li et al. (2024) — medical diagnosis benchmark
- FloDial: Raghu et al. (2021) — multi-turn troubleshooting dataset

3. Experimental reproducibility
The paper does not explicitly release training code or checkpoint links. For reproduction, follow the author team (CUHK + UCSD + Georgia Tech + ByteDance) for upcoming open-source releases.

key_takeaways: 识别并命名「信息自锁定」(Information Self-Locking, SeL) 现象: 主动推理场景下, agent 不再提出高信息量问题且难以内化已获取的信息
将主动推理分解为行动选择 (Action Selection, AS) 与信念追踪 (Belief Tracking, BT) 两个核心能力, 揭示二者双向负反馈耦合是 SeL 的结构性根因
提出 AREW (Advantage Reweighing) 方法: 通过注入方向性批评 (directional critiques) 重新分配学习信号, 帮助 agent 摆脱自锁, 无需修改奖励函数或训练额外奖励模型
在 7 个数据集上一致验证, 最多 60% 性能提升 (如 PE-G(S=3) 从 18.3 提升至 80.3)
field_medium_zh: 人工智能 / 强化学习
